subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones and My friends! The Luminary of Justice hath indeed risen, inasmuch as the All-Praised One, aided by God, hath been established upon the throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی و احبائی قد اشرق نیر العدل بما استوی الحمید ایده الله علی اریکه
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
